title: Localize Private Fields Used Only as Local Variables
description: Private fields that are only used as local variables within methods should be converted into local variables. This is because they are not being used to store class information and transforming them into local variables can prevent misunderstandings.
recommendation: Transform the private field into a local variable within the relevant method(s).
impact: Improves code readability and prevents potential misunderstandings regarding the role of the variable.

checks.message: Transform the private field into a local variable within the relevant method(s).
